Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
End of session documentation - UK REACH deadline extension analysis

Created comprehensive update document analyzing UK Government''s announcement
of 3-year REACH registration deadline extension (Option 1 selected).

Key updates:
- New registration deadline: 27 October 2029 (was 27 October 2026)
- ATRm framework NOT finalized - still "under consideration"
- Critical constraint: ATRm must be published by October 2027 for 2-year transition
- Waiting period identified: ~22 months before registration work can commence
- Consultant preference order: CS Regulatory → TT Environmental → Valpak
- Project phase shift: From urgent crisis to passive monitoring mode

Files:
- UpdateDec25.md - NEW comprehensive analysis (v1.1, 221 lines)
- SESSION_LOG.md - Added session 2025-12-22 entry
- PROJECT_STATUS.md - Updated for extended timeline and ATRm constraints
- CHANGELOG.md - Added 2025-12-22 release notes

Strategic impact: All registration work now on hold pending ATRm publication.
Business can continue importing normally until late 2027 with no immediate
action or costs required.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(gemini -p "Search for detailed information about UK REACH registration number UK-01-9638319484-0-XXXX for HVO \(Hydrotreated Vegetable Oil\), CAS 700-571-2. I need to find: 1\) Whether this is a valid active registration, 2\) The lead registrant company name, 3\) The tonnage band covered by this registration, 4\) Any consortium arrangements, 5\) Official UK HSE or ECHA documentation confirming this registration. Please focus on authoritative UK government sources and official REACH databases.")

2. Registrant companies and registration status
